title: Neobakeria burchellii
taxonomy: Neobakeria burchellii is classified as a plant in the family Asteraceae. It belongs to the genus Neobakeria and is further classified into the kingdom Plantae. The species is a flowering plant, with its classification also including the class Magnoliopsida. Neobakeria burchellii is native to South Africa, and its classification is based on its morphology and genetic characteristics. Further research is needed to confirm the exact classification of this species.
